About NBA Week 2026

Africa's Premier Blockchain and AI Innovation Summit

Nigeria Blockchain and AI Week (NBA Week) is Nigeria's premier annual gathering spotlighting the convergence of blockchain technology, artificial intelligence, and crypto innovation. This event convenes industry leaders, policymakers, innovators, investors, and tech enthusiasts from across Nigeria, West Africa, and the global ecosystem.

Now in its sixth edition, NBA Week is proudly organized by CoinNewsExtra, Africa's number one Web3 TV, dedicated to blockchain, AI, and crypto, in collaboration with the Fintech Association of Nigeria (FAN).

NBA Week serves as a dynamic platform for thought leadership, strategic collaboration, policy dialogue, startup showcases, and product launches, accelerating Africa's position in the global emerging technology landscape.

Register Now

  • Unrivaled Networking
  • Cutting-Edge Insights

Conference Schedule — October 22–23, 2026

Two days of keynotes, panels, workshops, and networking

Explore our lineup of sessions covering blockchain, AI, DeFi, crypto policy, and startup innovation in Lagos, Nigeria.

09:00 AM Main Stage

Opening Keynote: The State of Blockchain in Africa

A comprehensive overview of blockchain adoption across Africa and the opportunities ahead.

Adaeze Okafor — CEO & Co-Founder, ChainBridge Africa
10:30 AM Room A

Panel: DeFi Opportunities in Emerging Markets

Exploring how decentralized finance is reshaping financial access across Africa.

Oluwaseun Adeyemi — Founder, DeFi Lagos & Panel
10:30 AM Room B

Workshop: Building AI Agents for Real-World Use Cases

Hands-on session on designing and deploying AI agents for practical applications.

Fatima Al-Hassan — AI Research Lead, Google DeepMind Africa
02:00 PM Main Stage

Fireside Chat: Crypto Regulation — What Nigeria Gets Right

A candid discussion on Nigeria's evolving regulatory landscape for digital assets.

Ngozi Chukwu — Director, Digital Innovation, Central Bank of Nigeria
04:00 PM Main Stage

Startup Pitch Competition — Round 1

Watch innovative startups compete for funding and recognition in blockchain, AI, and DeFi.

09:00 AM Main Stage

Keynote: AI-Powered Financial Inclusion

How AI is unlocking financial services for millions of unbanked Africans.

Ibrahim Bello — VP, Engineering, Flutterwave
10:30 AM Room A

Panel: Tokenization of Real-World Assets in Africa

The transformative potential of bringing real estate, commodities, and more on-chain.

10:30 AM Room B

Workshop: Smart Contract Security Best Practices

Learn to audit, test, and secure smart contracts against common vulnerabilities.

02:00 PM Main Stage

Policy Roundtable: CBN, SEC & NITDA on Digital Assets

Top regulators discuss the future framework for crypto and AI in Nigeria.

04:00 PM Main Stage

Startup Pitch Competition — Finals

The top startups go head-to-head for the grand prize.

06:00 PM Main Stage

Closing Ceremony, Awards & VIP After-Party

Celebrating the best of NBA Week 2026 — startup winners, community awards, closing remarks, and an exclusive evening for VIP pass holders.

What People Say

Voices from past NBA Week attendees

"NBA Week completely changed how I think about blockchain adoption in Nigeria. The connections I made there led directly to our seed round."

Ada Okonkwo Founder, ChainPay

"The most well-organized crypto event I've attended in Africa. The quality of speakers and the policy roundtables were exceptional."

David Olumide Managing Partner, Sahel Ventures

"As a developer, the workshops were hands-on and practical. I shipped my first smart contract by the end of Day 2. Can't wait for 2026."

Kemi Adesanya Blockchain Developer, Andela

"10,000 attendees gathered in Lagos for Africa's largest blockchain and AI summit."

— Report to Call News

"The most important crypto policy conversation happening on the continent right now."

— CoinGABBAR

"Africa's premier Web3 summit setting the agenda for blockchain innovation."

— CoinNewsExtra

"Disrupting narratives and building the future of decentralized Africa."

— DSRPTD

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about NBA Week

Nigeria Blockchain and AI Week (NBA Week) is Nigeria's premier annual summit at the intersection of blockchain, AI, and crypto innovation. Now in its sixth edition, it brings together leaders, builders, and policymakers for keynotes, panels, workshops, startup showcases, and policy dialogue.

Blockchain professionals, AI experts and data scientists, crypto traders and enthusiasts, developers and engineers, startups and entrepreneurs, investors and venture capitalists, bankers and financial institutions, regulators and government officials, students and academics, media professionals, and Web3 builders.

October 22–23, 2026 in Lagos, Nigeria.

NBA Week 2026 is entirely free to attend. Simply register to secure your place.

Yes! We accept USDT (ERC-20 & TRC-20), BTC, and ETH. You can also pay in Naira via Paystack or USD via international card.

Yes. Keynote sessions will be livestreamed. Professional and VIP pass holders also get access to full session recordings on-demand after the event.

We offer Platinum, Gold, and Media partnership tiers. Download our Partnership Deck or reach out directly to discuss custom packages.
